label: yes

So instead of moving forward from my current position away from A, I'm now facing back towards A. Now, I take 10 steps. Since I'm facing back towards A, each of these steps is bringing me closer to A. Starting from position 10 units away from A, moving 10 steps back would bring me to position 10 - 10 = 0. Position 0 is the starting point A. So according to this logic, yes, I would return to the starting point. But wait, maybe I need to consider the direction more carefully.
